title: Rapid Technology Assessment: Fusion energy
body: "This report is a summary of a project completed in March 2023. This report provides an introduction to fusion energy, recent developments, opportunities, and challenges identified through research and discussions with a range of experts.   We would like to thank the following for their contribution and expert review:     Dr Simon Bland    Prof Declan Diver    Dr Aneeqa Khan    First Light Fusion    Tokamak Energy    Kyoto Fusioneering    DESNZ    AWE    UKAEA    "
